subject: Re: [Typesense Cloud] Payment failed — action required

messages.subject: [Typesense Cloud] Payment failed — action required
messages.body:
Hi there,

We were unable to process your payment for Typesense Cloud (account: vectrix-labs).

Amount due: $59.00
Date attempted: January 18, 2026
Failure reason: Card declined

Please update your payment method at https://cloud.typesense.org/billing to avoid service interruption. Your account will be suspended after 7 days if payment is not received.

If you believe this is an error, contact support@typesense.io.

— Typesense Cloud Billing
https://cloud.typesense.org

messages.subject: Fwd: [Typesense Cloud] Payment failed — can you update the card?
messages.body:
Priya,

Forwarding this — the Typesense Cloud payment failed. Our company card on file got a new expiry date last month and I think that's what happened.

Can you log into the billing portal and update the card? The link is in the email below. Account will be suspended in 7 days if we don't fix it.

— Nina

---------- Forwarded message ----------
[Typesense billing email below]

messages.subject: Re: Fwd: [Typesense Cloud] Payment failed — can you update the card?
[Typesense Cloud] Payment successful — invoice #INV-2026-0118
messages.body:
Hi there,

Your payment has been successfully processed.

Amount: $59.00
Date: January 19, 2026
Invoice: INV-2026-0118

Thank you for updating your billing information. Your account is in good standing.

Download invoice: https://cloud.typesense.org/invoices/INV-2026-0118

— Typesense Cloud Billing
